subject: improve(a11y,dx): aria landmarks, print URLs, type-check script
body:
- Add aria-labelledby to Section component linking <section> to its <h2>
  heading for screen reader landmark navigation (WCAG 1.3.1)
- Add aria-label to ActivityTimeline <section> for heading hierarchy
- Add aria-label to project "View Project" links with project name so
  screen readers can distinguish between projects
- Show external link URLs in print via CSS ::after pseudo-element
- Add standalone "type-check" npm script for fast CI/dev feedback

Tags: a11y, accessibility, print, dx, aria
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
